atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports increasing dyspnea over the past few weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a loss of approximately 3.5 pounds since her last visit in April.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the weight loss to weight loss.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports leg cramps, particularly at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient manages leg cramps with pickle juice.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states she is currently not experiencing heartburn.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient discontinued prilosec two weeks ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient discontinued another medication two weeks ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no current urinary issues.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking lisinopril 10 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking furosemide 20 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking torsemide 20 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is not currently taking potassium supplements.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician suspects diastolic dysfunction

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports symptoms consistent with volume depletion

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports potential electrolyte imbalances

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician orders an electrocardiogram

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician plans a pre-operative examination within two weeks of the scheduled knee surgery

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician arranges for a colonoscopy at Bartley Regional Hospital within the next month, pending insurance coverage

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician prescribes magnesium supplementation twice daily to maintain serum levels above 2 mg/dL

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician continues current medications, including lisinopril and furosemide/torsemide

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in one month to assess surgical preparation and monitor heart failure status

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician counsels the patient on the importance of adhering to the medication schedule

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Clinician instructs the patient to avoid excessive salt intake
